templates: Hey {first_name}, it's {owner_name} from {business_name}. Saw your enquiry about quote for {trade_service}. Are you booking the job in or just price-checking right now? Quick call today?
Hi {first_name}, thanks for reaching out about quote for {trade_service}. When do you want the work done by? Got 5 minutes to chat?
{first_name}, {owner_name} here from {business_name}. Re your quote for {trade_service} enquiry: Want me to give you a ballpark over text first? What's a good time?
instant_sms.ps: PS. You can reply STOP anytime and we'll take you off the list. ABN on file, address in our reply email.

instant_email.subject: Re: your quote for {trade_service} enquiry

drip_sequence.subject: One thing I forgot to ask about your quote for {trade_service}
drip_sequence.body_seed: When do you want the work done by?

drip_sequence.body_seed: We came on site, gave a fixed quote, and they had a start date by Friday.

no_show_recovery.sms_first_touch: Hey {first_name}, missed you for the {appointment_type}. Want me to send a tradie out tomorrow morning for the on-site? Free now or later today?
